personal.title: Embedded AI Engineer | Full-Stack Systems Developer

summary: Computer Engineering graduate with hands-on experience across embedded AI systems, full-stack web development, and backend engineering. Built and deployed production-grade applications ranging from TinyML plant health monitoring on resource-constrained hardware to RESTful backends and responsive marketplace platforms. Skilled in bridging low-level embedded systems with cloud-connected full-stack solutions, with a strong focus on real-world problem solving and clean system architecture.

experience.title: Lead Developer
experience.description: Architected and deployed a production TinyML plant health monitoring system for real-time agricultural disease detection on Arduino Nano 33 BLE Sense. Built end-to-end system: MobileNetV1 edge inference → Raspberry Pi UART gateway → FastAPI backend → React dashboard. Optimized RAM allocation, implemented LGBM disease forecasting model, and resolved critical embedded constraints.

experience.title: Network Engineering Intern
experience.description: Designed a three-tier hierarchical network with OSPF routing and HSRP gateway redundancy. Deployed SNMP-based monitoring for proactive fault detection. Handled structured cabling (TIA-568B), access point provisioning, and hardware link debugging.

experience.title: Backend Developer
experience.description: Engineered RESTful backend with Spring Boot & PostgreSQL for booking and room management. Implemented JWT authentication and role-based session management.

experience.title: Front-End Developer
experience.description: Built responsive MVP marketplace connecting Ethiopian fashion designers with global clients using React and WooCommerce. Designed auth flows, product showcase, and payment integration.
